definition: A feeling of general bodily discomfort, fatigue or unpleasantness, often at the onset of illness.

definition: To reduce, lessen, or decrease; to make less severe or easier to bear.

definition: Sullen, gloomy; showing a brooding ill humour.

definition: Casually calm and relaxed.

definition: To harden; to obdure.

definition: To make dark; overshadow
example: While analyzing the claim, students needed to _______ before evaluating the counterpoint for a stronger interpretation. to explain the idea of to make dark; overshadow.

definition: Obedient; compliant with someone else's orders or wishes.
